title: Cobra PU Stone Panels
shortDescription: Ultra-lightweight artificial stone panels. Get a highly realistic, premium stone wall look in Delhi NCR without the heavy weight or messy cement work.
longDescription:
Goals Floors brings the revolutionary Cobra PU (Polyurethane) Stone series to Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida. If you love the rugged, natural look of stone walls but hate the hassle of installing them, this is the perfect solution. These panels look exactly like real natural stone but are incredibly lightweight and easy to handle.

Real stone cladding is extremely heavy, requires strong reinforced walls, and involves days of messy cement and mortar work. Our Cobra PU Stone solves all these problems. Weighing almost 90% less than real stone, they can be directly pasted onto any dry wall, plywood, or existing surface in just a few hours. This makes them the ultimate choice for quick luxury renovations in high-rise apartments, Aerocity hotel lobbies, and Cyber City corporate offices.

As a top project supplier in Delhi NCR, we guarantee panels that not only look stunning but are technically advanced. They are 100% waterproof, fire-retardant, and even help in absorbing echoes in large rooms.

features.title: Ultra-Lightweight Material
features.description: It weighs almost 90% less than real natural stone. This means it puts zero heavy load on your walls and is extremely easy to carry up to high-rise apartments.

features.title: Hyper-Realistic Natural Look
features.description: These panels are molded directly from real stone slabs. Every rough texture, vein, and organic cut is captured perfectly so it doesn't look artificial or 'plasticky'.

features.title: Fast, Cement-Free Installation
features.description: Say goodbye to messy cement, water, and sand. These panels can be easily cut with a normal wood saw and pasted directly onto the wall using strong structural glue.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Anti-Fungal
features.description: Polyurethane does not absorb any moisture. This makes the panels completely safe from water damage, fungus, or swelling, even in damp basements or bathroom dry areas.

features.title: Fire Safe & Sound Absorbing
features.description: Manufactured with Class B1 fire-retardant properties for commercial safety. Plus, the thick foam core naturally absorbs sound echoes, making your room quieter.

applications: Luxury Living Room TV Walls & Backdrops
installation: This is the fastest stone installation system available today. You do not need any messy mortar. The panels can be easily cut to size and pasted onto any flat, dust-free surface (like plaster, plywood, or drywall) using heavy-duty PU adhesives (like 3M). For high walls or ceilings, concealed screws are used in the joints for extra safety.
maintenance: It requires completely zero maintenance. Since the surface is non-porous, it does not absorb dust or liquid stains. You can simply clean it by wiping with a damp cloth or using a vacuum cleaner with a brush attachment to clean the deep textures.

faqs.question: What exactly is PU Stone?
faqs.answer: PU (Polyurethane) Stone is an advanced artificial wall panel. It is made from high-density foam that is molded and painted to look exactly like real natural stone. It gives you the luxury look of stone without the heavy weight and installation hassle.

faqs.question: Does it look fake or like cheap plastic up close?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Our Cobra series uses molds taken directly from real stone slabs. It captures every tiny detail, cleft, and texture of natural stone. Finished with premium multi-layered paints, it feels and looks remarkably real even from inches away.

faqs.question: Do I need cement and sand to install these panels?
faqs.answer: No cement or water is needed. Installation is a completely dry and clean process. The panels are pasted directly onto your wall or plywood using strong structural PU glue.

faqs.question: Can I install PU Stone on an existing painted wall or plywood?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. As long as the wall or plywood is flat, dry, and free from peeling paint or dust, you can directly glue the PU stone panels onto it.

faqs.question: How much lighter is it compared to real stone?
faqs.answer: PU stone weighs about 1.5 to 2.5 kg per panel, which is nearly 90% lighter than real stone. This is a huge advantage as it doesn't require heavy structural framing and is easy to transport.

faqs.question: Can I use these panels in my bathroom or a damp basement?
faqs.answer: Yes. Polyurethane is a 100% waterproof and non-porous material. It will never absorb moisture, meaning it is completely safe from mold, mildew, and water damage in basements or bathroom dry zones.

faqs.question: Are these panels safe from fire?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Cobra PU Stone panels are manufactured with Class B1 fire-retardant properties. This means the material will self-extinguish and will not help spread flames, making it safe for homes and commercial offices.

faqs.question: Can I use PU Stone on the outside exterior of my house?
faqs.answer: Standard PU Stone is highly durable but is primarily designed for interior spaces or semi-covered exterior areas (like deep balconies). If exposed to direct, harsh UV sunlight for years, the paint may slowly fade.

faqs.question: How do I clean the dust from the deep stone textures?
faqs.answer: Cleaning is very easy. The material doesn't absorb dirt. You can simply wipe it with a damp microfiber cloth, use a feather duster, or use a vacuum cleaner with a soft brush attachment for the deep crevices.

faqs.question: Do you supply PU Stone in bulk for commercial projects in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a major B2B supplier of PU Stone in Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida. We offer special project pricing, bulk discounts, and ready stock for architects, builders, and interior contractors.

installationSteps.title: Layout Planning
points: First, dry-lay the panels on the floor to check the stone pattern and color mix.
Plan your cuts carefully to minimize any material wastage.

installationSteps.title: Cutting to Size
points: Measure the wall and cut the panels easily using any standard wood-cutting saw.
Lightly sand the cut edges for a perfectly flat and clean fit.

installationSteps.title: Adhesion & Fixing
points: Apply strong structural PU adhesive (like 3M or Dow) in blobs on the back of the panel.
Press the panel firmly onto the clean wall surface.
For high ceilings or walls, drive concealed screws into the overlapping joints for extra grip.

installationSteps.title: Finishing Touches
points: Use matching color sealant or acrylic paint in the joints to hide them completely.
Touch up any visible cut edges with matching paint for a 100% realistic look.
